plugin_desc: WoMaster industrial switch SNMP baseline collection. This template uses standard MIB-II / IF-MIB to collect device uptime and 64-bit HC interface traffic. Current public facts confirm WoMaster industrial managed switch products and official switch MIB downloads, but they do not expose stable shared CPU, memory, temperature, fan or power health leaf OIDs with conservative status semantics, so vendor health metrics are not promoted into device-health metrics.
name: Switch
